privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in the task.json file are verified as correct. The task requires creating a formatted RFP proposal document with specific requirements: output file at /home/ga/Documents/TechFlow_Proposal_Volume_I.odt, page margins of 1.00 inch (2.54 cm) on all sides, header text 'RFP #2026-WIFI-09 - Technical Volume', and four required sections (Executive Summary, Technical Approach, Implementation Plan, Past Performance). Input data comes from /home/ga/Documents/draft_proposal.json and /home/ga/Documents/formatting_requirements.txt. All data is synthetic (created as part of task setup), though the proposal content references real technologies: 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 (IEEE standard approved February 2021) and Cisco Catalyst 9124AX (real Cisco product for outdoor wireless deployment).
